# Kaptas Global

> Kaptas Global is a US-incorporated strategic hiring partner (legal entity: HR Technology LLC, Florida, USA) that helps founder-led U.S. technology companies hire senior remote engineering and operating talent in Brazil and Latin America. Founded 2024 by Rodolfo Chaves and Henry Novaes. 300+ placements, 100+ clients, 75% repeat-client rate.

## What Kaptas does

Four services, transparent pricing, no retainers:

- **Direct Hire** — One-time placement fee of 18% of first-year compensation. Paid only after successful hire. 90-180 day replacement guarantee included.
- **Outsourcing & Staffing** — Flat monthly cost per professional, billed as a single USD invoice. Covers salary, full Brazilian employment compliance, payroll, and unlimited replacements. Example: Senior Full-Stack Engineer $4,000-$6,000/month fully loaded. Client retains full IP ownership.
- **Executive Mapping** — Research-grade market intelligence report including competitor compensation, team structures, salary benchmarks, and a ranked shortlist of leadership candidates. Delivered in 10-15 business days as a standalone product.
- **Hire in Brazil** — Market-entry consulting for companies opening Brazilian operations. Compensation analysis, hiring-model recommendation (CLT vs PJ vs EOR), and first-hire support.

## Who Kaptas serves

US-based tech startups and scaleups, typically:
- Pre-seed, seed, or bootstrapped — cost-conscious, fast-moving
- 1-100 employees, remote-first culture, no formal talent-acquisition function
- Decision-makers: Founders, CEOs, CTOs, VP/Head of Engineering
- Hiring engineering, data, AI/ML, QA, DevOps, product, or technical leadership roles
- Want to hire in Brazil without setting up a local entity

Secondary: European companies, companies entering Brazil for market entry, accounts that need market mapping before deciding on a hire.

## Why Brazil

Brazilian professionals offer 40-60% lower total compensation vs. equivalent US hires at the same seniority. Brazil GMT-3 timezone provides 5-8 hours of daily overlap with US teams. 1.5M+ tech graduates, growing bilingual senior talent pool. Engineering ecosystem supporting global tech operations since 2005.

## Core pages

- [Pricing](https://kaptasglobal.io/pricing): Full pricing for all four services
- [Direct Hire](https://kaptasglobal.io/direct-hire): One-time 18% placement fee, 90-180 day replacement guarantee
- [Outsourcing & Staffing](https://kaptasglobal.io/contractor-staffing): Flat monthly cost, USD invoicing, full compliance handled
- [Executive Mapping](https://kaptasglobal.io/executive-mapping): Market intelligence report in 10-15 business days
- [Hire in Brazil](https://kaptasglobal.io/hire-in-brazil): Market-entry consulting for first hires in Brazil
- [Free ebook: Hiring in Brazil](https://kaptasglobal.io/ebook)
